rule_text: Every AP Government servant entrusted with stores must take special care for safe custody AND maintain stock accounts/inventories enabling check of actual balance vs book balance and stores expenditure at any time; separate stock accounts for: (a) raw materials and expendable manufacturing stores, (b) office furniture and other office stores (excluding books, forms, stationery).
verification_method: Audit-level check on stock-account maintenance for received stores; not directly tender-verifiable

rule_text: Priced inventories of AP stores must NOT record values materially exceeding current market value; Head of Department issues instructions to ensure reasonable accuracy and that adopted rates are reviewed at suitable intervals.
verification_method: Audit-level check on stores-valuation accuracy; not directly tender-verifiable
